creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
Created attachment 151867
mingw32-binutils.patch

I am making devel/mingw32-binutils a slave port to devel/binutils. This will make it so it'll be kept in-line with updates to devel/binutils.

NOTE: Due to this, the files directory as well as distinfo and pkg-descr have been removed.
